HGSS.105.0000:
Welcome to the Battle Factory!\f
I am your guide to the Single and
Double Battle challenges.\f
Please be aware that these challenges
are designed for a single Trainer.\f
HGSS.105.0001:
Which challenge would
you like to take? [0200,0000]
HGSS.105.0002:
At the Battle Factory, you may take
Single or Double Battle challenges\r
using rental Pokémon.\f
Once entered, your challenge lasts
until you lose.\f
After each win, you may trade a rented
Pokémon for one of the opponent’s.\f
The Level 50 option starts you off with
Pokémon that only know weak moves.\f
The Open Level option gives you access
to Lv. 100 Pokémon with powerful moves\r
from the start.\f
If you manage to win seven matches in
a row, you will earn Battle Points (BP).\f
If you want to interrupt your
challenge, please save the game.\f
If you don’t save, you will be
disqualified from your challenge.\f
Please be aware of that!\f
HGSS.105.0003:
Welcome to the Battle Factory!\f
I am your guide to the Multi Battle
challenge.\f
Please be aware that this challenge
requires two Trainers.\f
HGSS.105.0004:
Would you like to take the Battle
Factory Multi Battle challenge? [0200,0000]
HGSS.105.0005:
You may team up with a friend for a
Multi Battle challenge using rental\r
Pokémon.\f
Both partners will be provided with two
rental Pokémon each.\f
Once entered, you and your partner
conduct Multi Battles until you lose.\f
After each win, you or your partner
may trade a single rented Pokémon.\f
If you manage to win seven matches in
a row, you will earn Battle Points (BP).\f
The Level 50 option starts with rental
Pokémon that only know weak moves.\f
The Open Level option lets you rent
Lv. 100 Pokémon with powerful moves\r
from the start.\f
Please note: a Battle Factory Multi
Battle challenge can’t be interrupted.\f
HGSS.105.0006: We hope to see you again!
HGSS.105.0007:
Which challenge level would you like
to play? Level 50 or Open Level? [0200,0000]
HGSS.105.0008:
You must save the game before I
show you in. Is that OK? [0200,0000]
HGSS.105.0010: We look forward to your next visit.\f
HGSS.105.0011:
We’ve missed you!\f
You must save the game before you
resume your challenge. Please wait.
HGSS.105.0012:
Excuse me!\f
You didn’t save before you quit your
challenge last time.\f
Because of that, you have been
disqualified from your challenge!\f
HGSS.105.0013:
Congratulations!\f
In recognition of your victory, we
present you this commemorative print!\f
HGSS.105.0014:
The Gold Print was added to
[0103,0000,0000]’s Vs. Recorder!\f
HGSS.105.0015:
The Silver Print was added to
[0103,0000,0000]’s Vs. Recorder!\f
HGSS.105.0024:
One Trainer should select
“BECOME LEADER.”\f
The other Trainer must select
“JOIN GROUP.” [0200,0000]
HGSS.105.0025:
We need to launch DS Wireless
Communications. [0200,0000]
HGSS.105.0026:
You must save the game before I
show you in. Please wait.
HGSS.105.0027:
The staff tell you about the next
Trainer you’ll face.\f
They’re very helpful here.
Don’t you think?
HGSS.105.0028:
They tell you about the next Trainer
you’ll face? That’s really nice.\f
You know, you can prepare for it
once you know what kind of Trainer\r
the next one is!
HGSS.105.0029:
It’ll help you choose a Pokémon when
you remember what kind of Pokémon\r
the other Trainer had and what moves\r
they used.
HGSS.105.0030:
This is a place to battle with rental
Pokémon, right?\f
It is a good chance to try Pokémon
you’ve never trained.\f
You’ll learn about new Pokémon
while having exciting battles!\f
What more could you want?
HGSS.105.0031:
Do you have a lot of Pokémon?\f
I’m not too proud to say this, but...
I have only a few!\f
But there is nothing to worry about.
Do you know why?\f
This facility, the Battle Factory, has
you use rental Pokémon for battles!
HGSS.105.0032:
So you have to battle with Pokémon
you just met instead of with your\r
cherished Pokémon you’ve always\r
battled with?\f
Oh, I don’t know if I could...
Will they be nice to me...?\r
I’m a little worried.
HGSS.105.0033:
All the Trainers gathered at the
Battle Frontier are nice,\r
pleasant people!\f
I’m patrolling here on duty, but
otherwise I would love to change\r
my uniform to participate!
